description: The TC needs to send a weekly status update to the client and agent on a pending transaction.

nodes.task_description: Review the transaction checklist for the upcoming and completed tasks.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies that the inspection is complete and the appraisal is scheduled for next week.

nodes.task_description: Draft a summary email outlining the current status.

expected_outcome.expected: A clear, concise email is written summarizing what has been done and what is next.

nodes.task_description: Send the summary email to the client, agent, and lender.

expected_outcome.expected: The status update email is sent to all relevant parties.
